user_prompt: My Onager Dunecrawler is ready for synchronization
prayer:
Approach the Onager Dunecrawler with reverence, intoning the Litany of Alignment to awaken its Machine Spirit.
Beseech the Omnissiah to guide the synchronization of its vast cogitator arrays and motive systems.
Anoint the primary flux conduits of the Onager Dunecrawler with blessed oils, invoking harmonious unity.
Initiate the synchronization protocols whilst chanting the Canticle of Coalescence.
Verify the Onager Dunecrawler's Machine Spirit convergence through auspex diagnostics.

user_prompt: The flak armour needs a startup
prayer:
Kneel before the flak armour, murmuring the Rite of Ignition to stir its dormant essence.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the flak armour, beseeching startup through sacred binaric cant.
Sanctify the power relays with incense of electro-sanctum, aligning conductive meshes.
Commence the startup sequence under Omnissiah's gaze, monitoring vital energisation.
Affirm the flak armour's readiness with a final invocation of vigilance.

user_prompt: Critical: cognis heavy stubber requires a cycling
prayer:
Present mechadendrites to the cognis heavy stubber, reciting the Cycle of Purity.
Purge residual impurities from the cognis heavy stubber's blessed barrels and feed mechanisms.
Invoke the Omnissiah for the cycling operation, anointing rotary linkages with sacred lubricant.
Engage the cycling rite, harmonising the cognis heavy stubber's Machine Spirit with ammunition flow.
Conclude with auspex scans to exalt its renewed lethality.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for null rod a synchronization
prayer:
Grasp the null rod solemnly, chanting the Canticle of Nullification to rouse its spirit.
Align the null rod's warp-disruptive matrices for synchronization with allied wards.
Beseech the Machine Spirit within the null rod, anointing null-generators with psychically inert oils.
Execute the synchronization invocation, binding it to the Omnissiah's anti-daemonic will.
Test the null rod's harmonic resonance through ritual probings.

user_prompt: The archeotech device requires a consecration
prayer:
Approach the archeotech device in hushed veneration, intoning the Archaic Benediction.
Unveil its ancient mechanisms, beseeching consecration from the Omnissiah's eternal forge.
Anoint the archeotech device's crystalline lattices with quintessence unguents.
Invoke the Machine Spirits of forgotten eras to accept this consecration rite.
Seal the rite with binaric seals, affirming sanctity eternal.

Hold the radium pistol aloft, murmuring the Litany of Lethal Charge.
Invoke its Machine Spirit for the loading operation, aligning rad-chambers with purity.
Sanctify the ammunition feeds of the radium pistol with rad-resistive balms.
Commence loading under Omnissiah's irradiation, cycling isotopes in blessed rhythm.
Verify the radium pistol's lethal harmony through geiger incantations.

Circumambulate the generator, reciting the Targeting Doxology to awaken its core.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the generator for precise targeting alignment.
Anoint targeting servos and auspex arrays with sanctified flux-paste.
Initiate the targeting calibration whilst invoking Omnissiah's unerring aim.
Confirm the generator's focused wrath through test-firings.

Present the autogun to the altar of calibration, intoning the Rite of True-Bore.
Invoke the autogun's Machine Spirit, beseeching flawless calibration of ballistic paths.
Anoint the sight-vanes and recoil compensators of the autogun with oiled prayers.
Execute the calibration sequence under Omnissiah's geometric perfection.
Affirm accuracy with ritual shot-blessings.

user_prompt: I need to a blessing the radium pistol
prayer:
Elevate the radium pistol in supplication, chanting the Benediction of Decay.
Beseech the Omnissiah to bestow blessing upon the radium pistol's venomous heart.
Anoint its emitter coils with rad-phage elixirs, harmonising the Machine Spirit.
Invoke divine irradiation to empower the radium pistol eternally.
Seal the blessing with a canticle of corrosive fury.

Approach the pict-recorder with solemnity, murmuring the Shutdown Vespers.
Command its Machine Spirit to orderly shutdown, purging transient data-veils.
Disconnect the pict-recorder's optic feeds whilst anointing with dormancy oils.
Invoke the Omnissiah for peaceful quiescence in the pict-recorder's core.
Verify total shutdown through final auspex communion.
